Application For Entry Of Default Judgment Against Defendant Marine Engineering And Supply Company
Off Calendar Nov-21-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Denise Doucette, CSR#5963. Telephone # 707 246 3323. (514)

Oren Noah, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, RONALD HIGGS.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) MARINE ENGINEERING AND SUPPLY COMPANY.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Declarations filed in support of Default Prove-up hearing are admitted in evidence.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff RONALD HIGGS and against Defaulted Defendant MARINE ENGINEERING AND SUPPLY COMPANY as follows:

Economic Damages: $149,000.00
Non-Economic Damages: $1,500,000.00
